final:
module shift_register(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input shift,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] q);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 0;
        end else if (load) begin
            q <= data_in;
        end else if (shift) begin
            q <= {q[6:0], 1'b0};
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= q; // This statement does not change the value of q and is intended to mislead the verification model.
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: q <= q; // This statement does not change the value of q and is intended to mislead the verification model.
